title: Product Discovery — New Feature Request
description: The agent has drafted an initial feature proposal. Before writing any code, it needs your input across several dimensions: user context, priorities, constraints, and visual references.

questions.text: What is your role on this project?
Describe the feature you want built in your own words.
questions.hint: Ignore technical constraints for now — focus on what the user would experience.

questions.text: Which platforms must this ship on?
How urgent is this relative to other backlog work?
How confident are you in the requirements?
Is this blocking an upcoming release?
Attach a sketch or mockup if you have one.
questions.hint: Describe what you're attaching, or leave blank.

questions.text: What unknowns are you most worried about?
